arts.ttl: Alex Valle shares emotional farewell message as Celtic exit confirmed
arts.sum: Alex Valle has shared an emotional farewell message after his exit from Celtic was confirmed.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer news: 'Best striker since Henrik Larsson' leaves club as Jota secures emotional return
arts.sum: Celtic confirm the return of Jota in an £8m deal from Rennes, but lose a fan favourite in the opposite direction.

arts.ttl: 'Counter terrorism' warning for Aston Villa vs Celtic in Champions League
arts.sum: Ahead of the match, West Midlands Police released a picture of the letter which has been sent to locals which warns of an "elevated risk" on Wednesday, telling families of a raft of road closures and other measures in place for the game. We are writing to inform you about changes to the road closure arrangements for the upcoming fixture against Celtic.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers rues John McGinn as Celtic's one that got away – 'We were nearly there'
arts.sum: It's Battle of Britain time in the Champions League as matchday eight brings the league phase to a close

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers confirms Kieran Tierney will rejoin Celtic in free transfer deal
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers confirms Kieran Tierney will rejoin Celtic in free transfer

arts.ttl: Major Celtic injury blow as Carter-Vickers ruled out against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Cameron Carter-Vickers has been ruled out for Celtic against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Who will win Aston Villa vs Celtic? Our writers deliver their predictions for the Champions League blockbuster
arts.sum: It's a massive Midlands clash between two giants as they look to secure an automatic last-16 place

arts.ttl: 'Sad' Celtic exit, new striker outlined and every word on Kieran Tierney return – full Brendan Rodgers transfer update
arts.sum: It's all happening at Celtic Park in what is set to be a busy final few days of the January window

arts.ttl: Aston Villa ‘about to accept’ €70m+ offer for Jhon Duran from Al-Nassr
arts.sum: Jhon Duran has been linked with multiple clubs during the January transfer window, with it seeming clear someone around the footballer has been looking to build a big money deal. There’s been links with other Premier League clubs and there was even an ambitious claim over the past week which stated Real Madrid are keen The post Aston Villa ‘about to accept’ €70m+ offer for Jhon Duran from Al-Nassr appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers CONFIRMS Arsenal star Kieran Tierney will join Celtic this summer - but still hopes to bring him back to the Scottish giants this month
arts.sum: With loanee Alex Valle back at parent club Barcelona , Rodgers would like the left back to return north of the border before next week's transfer deadline to bolster his defence.
